stemHtml:
Given the following information, which flight level gives the shortest distance in NAM?

Ground distance: 200 NM
CAS: 180 kt
OAT: ISA +10°C
Track wind component at FL50: 10 kt headwind
Track wind component at FL70: 5 kt tailwind
Track wind component at FL100: 0 kt
Track wind component at FL120: 5 kt headwind
